title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Stye
description: Aloe barbadensis tinctures contains aloin, aloe-emodin, and aloe-erythroside, which are potent anti-inflammatory compounds. These bioactive constituents help reduce swelling and ease pain associated with stye. The antibacterial properties of aloe-emodin and aloe-erythroside combat bacterial infections that can cause stye, promoting healing and preventing further complications.
